prompt: Minimalist app icon on pure black background. Two crab pincers/claws arranged symmetrically to form the silhouette of eyeglasses. Each pincer curves into a circular lens shape, connected by a thin bridge in the center. The claws have a slight serrated edge texture on the outer rim. Drawn with thin glowing neon green lines (#00FF41) with a soft green phosphor bloom/glow, like a green CRT terminal display or oscilloscope trace. Think: if you drew glasses using crab claws on a 1980s green monochrome monitor. Ultra minimal, line art only, no fills, no text, no background elements. The glow should be subtle and organic. Perfect for a small app icon.
